overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a sleek black futuristic sports car with pink neon taillights driving through a rain-soaked neon-lit city center. The vehicle navigates wet streets reflecting holographic advertisements and illuminated skyscrapers in a dense urban environment with elevated highways and futuristic architecture.

events.description: vehicle initiates right turn at wet intersection

bright yellow striped pedestrian crosswalk on wet asphalt
large illuminated advertisement display on building facade
tall modern building with reflective glass windows
elevated rail structure running above the street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a rain-soaked urban intersection with a futuristic black sports car positioned at a yellow crosswalk. Elevated highway structures and monorail tracks dominate the upper portion of the frame while holographic billboards illuminate the right side. The vehicle accelerates and initiates a right turn, with sparse pedestrians visible on the distant sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban canyon with cylindrical tower

events.description: passing parked purple vehicle on right side of road

agents.ego_description: cruising straight down multi-lane street with cylindrical neon tower visible on left side

entered.detail: distinctive cylindrical skyscraper with horizontal rainbow neon rings
tall vertical digital billboard displaying animated content
futuristic purple vehicle parked along the curb
commercial structure with glass storefronts and illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: The vehicle proceeds straight into an urban canyon dominated by a distinctive cylindrical tower with horizontal neon rings on the left. The wet road surface reflects the vibrant neon lighting from surrounding advertisements. The car passes a parked purple sports car on the right while modern retail buildings line the street, with the elevated highway structure now visible only in the rear.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial commercial street with warehouse buildings

events.description: cylindrical neon tower exits view, industrial buildings with orange trim appear on right

agents.ego_description: continuing straight past industrial buildings with orange trim and concrete barriers

entered.detail: warehouse-style building with distinctive orange and red structural accents
low concrete divider separating lanes from sidewalk
industrial building with weathered facade and graffiti markings
enclosed walkway spanning across the street in the distance

segments.scene_description: The cylindrical tower disappears from view as the vehicle enters a more industrial district characterized by warehouse buildings with orange trim and concrete barriers lining the right side. The street continues straight with distant neon signage and an overhead pedestrian bridge visible ahead. The architecture shifts from modern glass retail to gritty industrial structures while maintaining the rainy cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a futuristic sports car travels from a high-tech urban intersection into a gritty industrial district. It begins at a rain-soaked crosswalk beneath towering monorail tracks and holographic billboards, accelerating into a right turn. As the vehicle proceeds, the scene shifts into a dense urban canyon where the wet road reflects vibrant neon lights and the camera passes a cylindrical tower adorned with glowing rings. The environment then transitions away from modern glass retail buildings and sleek architecture, moving straight ahead as the skyline opens up. Finally, the scenery transforms into an industrial zone characterized by concrete barriers and warehouses with orange trim, passing under a pedestrian bridge amidst the persistent rain.
